coreItems.name: Stridebreaker
coreItems.reason: Provides much-needed mobility and a slow effect for Darius to stick to targets and stack his Hemorrhage. Also offers health, AD, and attack speed, all crucial for his skirmishing potential.

coreItems.name: Sterak's Gage
coreItems.reason: Offers a significant health pool and a life-saving shield in all-ins, allowing Darius to survive burst and continue to deal damage, especially when his passive is fully stacked. The Tenacity is also valuable.

coreItems.name: Dead Man's Plate
coreItems.reason: Enhances Darius's ability to engage and chase with increased movement speed and a slow-applying empowered auto attack. Provides substantial armor and health for survivability.

coreItems.name: Black Cleaver
coreItems.reason: Reduces enemy armor, which amplifies Darius's physical damage output, especially useful against tankier opponents. Grants health, AD, and further movement speed on hit for better target access.

coreItems.name: Spirit Visage
coreItems.reason: Boosts Darius's magic resistance and significantly enhances all healing, including his Q (Decimate) heal. This item increases his durability against AP threats and his sustain in extended fights.

coreItems.name: Stridebreaker
coreItems.reason: Provides a crucial dash and slow for Garen to gap-close onto targets and keep them within his E (Judgment) spin. Also grants AD, attack speed, and health, all amplifying his combat potential.

coreItems.name: Phantom Dancer
coreItems.reason: Significantly boosts Garen's movement speed and attack speed, allowing him to position better during his E (Judgment) and kite or chase. The passive shield offers burst survivability.

coreItems.name: Mortal Reminder
coreItems.reason: Grants armor penetration and applies Grievous Wounds, essential for dealing with tankier targets and champions with strong healing. Synergizes well with his fast-spinning E.

coreItems.name: Dead Man's Plate
coreItems.reason: Increases Garen's mobility and burst damage potential with an empowered auto attack and slow. Provides significant armor and health, making him tankier while still increasing engage range.

coreItems.name: Sterak's Gage
coreItems.reason: Offers a massive health boost and a life-saving shield that scales with health, crucial for Garen to survive intense team fights and continue executing targets with his ultimate.

coreItems.name: Sunfire Aegis
coreItems.reason: Provides a strong burst of tankiness, sustained magic damage for waveclear, and synergizes with Shen's ability to remain in combat and apply taunts, burning enemies around him.

coreItems.name: Titanic Hydra
coreItems.reason: Grants substantial health and AD that scales with health, boosting Shen's split-pushing power and waveclear, while also adding an auto-attack reset and AoE damage for dueling and teamfights.

coreItems.name: Thornmail
coreItems.reason: Offers significant armor and applies Grievous Wounds to enemies attacking Shen, crucial for countering AD heavy champions and healers. Its active can also slow attackers.

coreItems.name: Spirit Visage
coreItems.reason: Increases magic resistance and amplifies Shen's passive shield and any healing effects, making him incredibly resilient against AP threats and improving his overall sustain.

coreItems.name: Randuin's Omen
coreItems.reason: Reduces incoming critical strike damage and provides a powerful active slow, essential for engaging or disengaging against AD carries and champions relying on critical strikes.
